title: Protocol for Extraction of High-Molecular-Weight Genomic DNA from Gram-Negative Bacteria
author: De Cesare, Alessandra
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Video demonstrating the protocol for extraction of High-Molecular-Weight Genomic DNA from Gram-negative bacteria based on MagAttract HMW DNA kit QIAGEN. Training video elaborated within the ArtiSaneFood project.
steps_raw: Video demonstrating the protocol for extraction of High-Molecular-Weight Genomic DNA from Gram-negative bacteria based on MagAttract HMW DNA kit QIAGEN. Training video elaborated within the ArtiSaneFood project.
